_comment: Species: Restriction Beast (禁制兽) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Restriction Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless beast made of living restriction runes, body shifts between inscription patterns
canonical.behavior: Inhabits ancient restriction arrays; attacks those who break restrictions; cultivates by absorbing broken restrictions
canonical.habitat: Restriction Mountain, ancient formation sites, sealed caves
canonical.diet: broken restrictions, formation fragments, restriction-aspected herbs
canonical.relationships: Guardian of Restriction Mountain; neutral to all cultivators who do not break restrictions
canonical.bloodline: Restriction-Dao lineage; born of accumulated broken restrictions
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: restriction_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
